commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds scoped mention-pattern policy controls for global, agent, provider, and conversation-level regex mention gating across channel runtimes, SDK exports, config schemas, docs, generated metadata, changelog, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows qa-channel sets regexes to an empty array when policy disables patterns, then still passes `canDetectMention: true` into the shared gate. I did not execute tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A narrow, source-reproducible qa-channel blocker remains and can be repaired on the PR branch without changing the product direction.

target.title: feat: add scoped mention pattern policy
target.author: patrick-slimelab

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
